web.title: House of Wellness Brickell Miami Residences | Condos for Sale
web.description: House of Wellness Residences Brickell offers luxury living with skyline views, rooftop pool, and prime Miami location near beaches, airports, and more.
web.markdown:
![](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/image01.png?v=f545669a)

BRICKELL

* * *

A new standard of wellness living, designed for balance, beauty, and longevity in Miami

* * *

[En español](https://es.houseofwellness.miami/)

[⬆︎](https://houseofwellness.miami/#gototop)

[![#home](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/image13.png?v=f545669a)](https://houseofwellness.miami/#home)

## Elevated _wellbeing_ in the heart of _Brickell_.

656 Residences / 33 Stories.Studios, to 2 Bedroom Configurations.Developed by North Development

**[the project](https://houseofwellness.miami/#project)**

**[the residences](https://houseofwellness.miami/#theresidences)**

**[Amenities](https://houseofwellness.miami/#amenities)**

**[FLOORPLANS](https://houseofwellness.miami/#floorplans)**

**[location](https://houseofwellness.miami/#locationn)**

**[brickell](https://houseofwellness.miami/#brickell)**

**[Pricing & Payment Plan](https://houseofwellness.miami/#paymentplan)**

**[Contact](https://houseofwellness.miami/#contact)**

Now in Pre-Construction.

Delivery 2029

![](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/image04.jpg?v=f545669a)

* * *

![](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/image06.jpg?v=f545669a)

## The _Project_

House of Wellness Residences is a 33-story visionary tower featuring 656 residences.The tower aims to redefine urban living and wellness in one of South Florida’s fastest-growing areas.The five-star amenities offered include a rooftop pool on the 33rd floor, parking spaces and more.

Each residence offers spectacular city views... more information coming soon.

* * *

![](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/image08.jpg?v=f545669a)

## The _Residences_

Imagine waking up in a sanctuary where the vibrant energy of Brickell merges with the absolute serenity of your home. At House of Wellness, every space has been designed not just to be inhabited, but to restore your essence. Here, the air you breathe, the light that surrounds you, and the technology that cares for you work in harmony to elevate your wellbeing. It is not just an address in the heart of Miami; it is the place where your body rests and your soul finally feels at home

Click on the images below

* * *

- [![Bedroom](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/gallery01/55e7af94_original.jpg?v=f545669a)
- [![Livingroom](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/gallery01/25bb277c_original.jpg?v=f545669a)

- [![Bathroom](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/gallery01/a4a0e5d1.jpg?v=f545669a)](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/gallery01/a4a0e5d1_original.jpg?v=f545669a)

- [![Livingroom](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/gallery01/83710c9b.jpg?v=f545669a)](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/gallery01/83710c9b_original.jpg?v=f545669a)

* * *

[![](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/image03.png?v=f545669a)](https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=13058508140&text=I%20am%20interested%20in%20House%20of%20Wellness%20Brickell)

_Amenities_

More than amenities, we have created spaces of deep restoration that act as a balm for the city's pace. Immerse yourself in the serenity of our infinity pool, find your center in our sunset-drenched yoga studio, or revitalize every cell in our world-class spa. At House of Wellness, every detail—from the purity of the air to the silence of our social areas—is orchestrated for you to reclaim your energy and reach your full potential. Here, luxury is not what you have, but how you feel.

Click on the images below

![](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/image05.jpg?v=f545669a)

### Brickell

## THE _LOCATION_

Building Address:

[152 SW 9th St, Miami, FL 33130](https://maps.app.goo.gl/oKu8oLPN86PBm2fH8)

\- Brickell City Centre: 4 minutes’ walk\- Downtown: 5 minutes’ drive\- Wynwood: 10 minutes’ drive\- Miami Beaches: 15 minutes’ drive\- Miami Airport: 15 minutes’ drive\- Key Biscayne: 15 minutes’ drive

* * *

![](https://houseofwellness.miami/assets/images/image09.jpg?v=f545669a)

BRICKELL

ABOUT THE NEIGHBORHOOD

Brickell serves as the financial hub of both Miami and South Florida. In the early 1900s, numerous grand estates were constructed along the Brickell Avenue corridor. By the 1970s and early 1980s, the area saw the rise of upscale high-rise condominiums. Today, Brickell Avenue is recognized as one of the most prestigious and cosmopolitan neighborhoods in all of South Florida.It's a prime destination for young professionals and corporate leaders working for multinational firms based in the area. Brickell delivers a blend of tropical charm and upscale living, featuring breathtaking views of Biscayne Bay and abundant opportunities for enjoying the outdoors.Among the area’s well-known highlights is The Shops at Mary Brickell Village. Additionally, in 2012, development began on Brickell City Centre—an expansive, much-anticipated complex that includes retail, restaurants, lodging, and office space. Without a doubt, Brickell Avenue stands out as one of the most desirable places to be.

* * *

# House of Wellness

152 SW 9th St Miami FL 33130

House of Wellness is a newly launched preconstruction condominium developed by North Development — a joint venture between Oak Capital and Edifica — and designed by Studio Mc+G Architecture, led by Jennifer McConney. Rising 34 stories and comprising 656 condominium residences, the tower introduces a first-of-its-kind wellness-centered residential concept to the heart of Miami. Located at 152 SW 9th Street in [Brickell](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/brickell-condos "Brickell"), adjacent to The Underline and the Metromover, House of Wellness blends intentional design, hospitality-driven service, and a holistic lifestyle philosophy to create a new standard for urban condo living. House of Wellness is expected to be delivered in Q1 2030.

## House of Wellness Floor Plans & Residence Features

The building offers a curated mix of studio, one-, and two-bedroom floor plans, with residences starting at $390,000. Homes are thoughtfully designed around modern living, featuring lofty 9’4” ceiling heights, finished flooring throughout, porcelain bathroom tile, two-tone cabinetry with terrazzo countertops, and premium appliance packages including cooktop, refrigerator, dishwasher, and speed oven. Select residences include polished concrete balconies and offer exquisite views of the Brickell skyline and Biscayne Bay, delivering a seamless balance between vibrant city energy and waterfront tranquility.

## House of Wellness Amenities & Services

Spanning approximately 22,000 square feet of amenities, House of Wellness is anchored by its Integrated Wellness Method — a personalized framework designed to evolve with each resident. Fitness and active lifestyle offerings include a state-of-the-art gym, private personal training room, indoor and outdoor functional training areas, outdoor class terrace, and cold plunge. Spa and relaxation amenities feature a full-service spa, steam room, sauna, hammam, and a skyline rooftop pool with lounge chairs and cabanas. Social and community spaces include a rooftop clubhouse with event kitchen, co-working spaces, social lounge, juice bar and pantry, podcast room, grills, outdoor lounge areas, and pet-friendly amenities including a dog spa and park. Residents also benefit from a comprehensive 360° health assessment upon move-in, personalized wellness plans with follow-ups, nutrition consultations, personal training, physical therapy, massage therapy, esthetician services, IV therapy, community classes, an on-site lifestyle director, wellness ambassadors, five stories of private parking, 24-hour concierge and security, in-house professional management, and a dedicated wellness app for service bookings and programming.

## House of Wellness Location

Situated within walking distance of Mary Brickell Village and Brickell City Centre, and directly adjacent to The Underline and the Metromover, House of Wellness Brickell sits at the center of Miami’s most connected urban district. Residents can access restaurants, cafés, fitness studios, grocery stores, and public transportation within minutes by foot. By car, Downtown Miami, Coconut Grove, Wynwood, the Design District, Key Biscayne, Miami International Airport, and Miami Beach are all easily reachable. With its prime Brickell address and comprehensive wellness-driven lifestyle, House of Wellness represents a new generation of thoughtfully designed condominium living in Miami.
